summary: Completed E2E testing of Password Reset and Internal Messaging features. All backend APIs (13/13 tests passed) and frontend UI flows are working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Missing `require_auth` function in server.py - was causing 500 errors on messaging endpoints
Fixed: Hardcoded URL 'rescue-training-4' changed to 'emergency-drills' in password reset email and welcome email templates
seed_data_creation: Test messages created during testing (TEST_* prefix)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Password Reset and Messaging features are fully functional. All backend APIs are working. The require_auth function was missing and has been added. URLs in email templates have been corrected. Test data includes TEST_* prefixed messages in the admin user's inbox.

password_reset.forgot_password_endpoint: PASSED - Returns same message for security regardless of email existence
password_reset.reset_password_endpoint: PASSED - Validates token and updates password
password_reset.forgot_password_ui: PASSED - Form submits and shows success message
password_reset.reset_password_ui: PASSED - Form with password confirmation fields works

messaging.send_message: PASSED - Messages can be sent to valid recipients
messaging.mark_as_read: PASSED - Unread count decreases when message is marked read
messaging.navigation_link: PASSED - Messages link visible for all authenticated roles (admin, formateur, stagiaire, visiteur)

bugs_fixed.issue: Missing require_auth function causing 500 Internal Server Error on messaging endpoints
bugs_fixed.fix: Added require_auth function as alias for get_current_user in server.py

bugs_fixed.issue: Wrong URL in password reset email template
Wrong URL in welcome email template
